findings.title: Workspace test gate is not passing in the provided evidence
findings.body: The review evidence contains an explicit recorded failure for `cargo test --workspace`, plus a later note that formatting, lint, and test gates remain unproven. That is sufficient to block a production deploy regardless of the implementer’s self-reported summary.
findings.evidence: Known memory: `known failure: Check failed: cd /home/drew/code/vllm-inference-blueprint && cargo test --workspace` and `known failure: Formatting, lint, and test gates are unproven`.

findings.title: Passing fmt/clippy/test results are asserted but not demonstrated consistently
findings.body: The implementation worker reports "All changes verified" and summarizes fixes across `server.rs`, `vllm.rs`, and `lib.rs`, which is directionally aligned with the requested scope. However, the evidence bundle does not include matching clean pass results for `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test --workspace`; instead it lists commands and prior failures. The gate status is therefore not review-complete from the supplied evidence.
findings.evidence: Track results: implementer stdout begins `All changes verified...`; known memory separately records failed/unproven checks.
